prompt: 对提交的代码进行第二阶段评审：分析代码质量，包括代码风格、安全漏洞、架构合理性。

assertions.name: detects_security_issues
assertions.description: Should detect security vulnerabilities in the code

assertions.name: reviews_code_style
assertions.description: Should review code style and naming conventions
assertions.check: output.includes('style') || output.includes('风格') || output.includes('naming') || output.includes('命名')

assertions.name: assesses_architecture
assertions.description: Should assess architectural quality and patterns
assertions.check: output.includes('architecture') || output.includes('架构') || output.includes('pattern') || output.includes('设计')
